message:
Update tql plugin to use tenzir-mcp@latest

Bump version to 0.1.1 and update the MCP server specification to always
use the latest version. This ensures users receive the most recent features
and improvements from the Tenzir MCP server automatically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Code <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+---
+title: Update tql plugin to use tenzir-mcp@latest
+type: change
+authors:
+- mavam
+- claude
+components:
+- tql
+created: 2025-12-12T11:28:33.914542Z
+---
+
+Update tql plugin to use `tenzir-mcp@latest` to ensure users always have the latest MCP server version. This ensures compatibility with the most recent Tenzir MCP server features and improvements.

@@ -23,5 +23,5 @@ Requires [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/) to be installed.
 
 - **When it triggers**: The MCP server starts when the plugin is loaded
 - **What actions it performs**: Provides tools for building and executing TQL
-  pipelines via the `uvx tenzir-mcp` command
+  pipelines via the MCP server
 - **Dependencies**: Requires `uv` / `uvx` to be installed
